allow: PowerShell(cd e:\\Quanly_cafe\\BackEnd\\BackEnd; $env:Path += ";$env:USERPROFILE\\.dotnet\\tools"; dotnet ef migrations add AddTables 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; dotnet ef database update 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4)

PowerShell($p = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($p\){ "py: $\($p.Source\)" }; $p2=\(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($p2\){ "python: $\($p2.Source\)" }; py --version 2>&1; python --version 2>&1)
PowerShell(sqlcmd -S . -E -W -Q "SELECT MigrationId FROM QuanLyCF.dbo.__EFMigrationsHistory ORDER BY MigrationId;" 2>&1)
PowerShell($q = "SELECT name FROM QuanLyCF.sys.tables WHERE name <> '__EFMigrationsHistory' ORDER BY name;")

PowerShell(cd e:\\Quanly_cafe\\BackEnd\\BackEnd; $env:Path += ";$env:USERPROFILE\\.dotnet\\tools"; dotnet ef migrations add AddAllModules 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; dotnet ef database update 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4)
PowerShell(sqlcmd -S . -E -W -Q "SELECT name FROM QuanLyCF.sys.tables WHERE name NOT IN \('__EFMigrationsHistory','sysdiagrams'\) ORDER BY name;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'ngrok','cloudflared','lt'\) { $p = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "$c -> $\($p.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$c -> KHONG CO" } })

PowerShell($dest = "E:\\Quanly_cafe\\cloudflared.exe"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Write-Output "Da co cloudflared.exe" } else { $ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe" -OutFile $dest; Write-Output "Tai xong" }; & $dest --version)

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Write-Output "5173 owner PID=$p \($\(\(Get-Process -Id $p\).ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Output "stopped" } else { Write-Output "5173 khong co listener" })

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5124 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Output "stopped BE PID=$p" } else { Write-Output "5124 khong co listener" })

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5124 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Output "stopped BE PID=$p" } else { Write-Output "5124 trong" })
